position_changes: No real team list available for Parramatta Eels this round, from EITHER the committed Job B file or the real live nrl.com fallback -- using historical most-frequent position for every player on this team. This should be rare: team lists are confirmed real and published every Tuesday 4pm, well before this script's real Thursday-morning run, and there are now two independent real sources for them. If you're seeing this on a genuine Thursday run, something has gone wrong with BOTH Job B and nrl.com's real listing page -- worth investigating directly.
